text: Did you know you can create AI telephony agents in just a few steps? . Yes, with VideoSDK, the future is here! . Imagine handling calls like a pro. . Let’s dive into how you can make this happen!

First, you need Python 3.12 or higher. . Simple, right? Then, create your VideoSDK account for that all-important VIDEOSDK_TOKEN. . This token is your gateway to the global telephone network via SIP providers like Twilio! .

Now, let’s talk structure! You’ll need a main script, a dependency file, and an environment configuration. . Start with creating a .env file for your secret keys. . Then, get your core logic in 'main.py' and dependencies in 'requirements.txt'. It’s all about organization!

Once everything is set up, your AI agent can process audio in real-time! . That means it can handle both inbound and outbound calls seamlessly! . Plus, with Routing Rules, calls are easily directed to your self-hosted agent. .
So, are you ready to transform how you handle calls? . With VideoSDK, the possibilities are endless! . Jump in, build, and let your AI agent shine!
